subject: [PATCH v4 2/2] mm/vmscan: reduce lru_lock contention via vmstat-derived scan-balance cost

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch reduces contention on the lru_lock by moving the calculation of scan balance costs from being accumulated under lruvec->lru_lock to using per-LRU vmstat counters. The patch introduces new node_stat counters for PGROTATE_{ANON,FILE} and WORKINGSET_RESTORE_{ANON,FILE} to track relevant metrics, which are then used in prepare_scan_control() to calculate the scan balance costs. This change aims to alleviate contention on memory-heavy workloads by decoupling the cost calculation from the lru_lock acquisition sites.
